full_text:
Li Yi (Xiaoyi) 李義 (孝懿)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Yi (李義), styledXiaoyi (孝懿), was born in Zuopingyi. A generous man with knowledge of ritual. Helped maintain a self-defence group in the area. Li Yi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom.
